series.realGdp: GDP adjusted for inflation using prices from a fixed base year.
series.realGdpPerCapita: GDP adjusted for inflation using prices from a fixed base year.
series.gdpGrowth: Annual percentage change in real GDP in local currency.
series.inflationRate: Annual percentage change in average consumer prices.
series.unemploymentRate: People without work, available for work, and seeking work, as a share of the labor force.
series.ppp: GDP based on purchasing power parity, measured in current international dollars.
series.pppPerCapita: GDP based on purchasing power parity, measured in current international dollars.
series.population: Total population based on residents present in the country.
series.populationDensity: Residents per km² of land area.
series.lifeExpectancy: Expected years a newborn would live under current mortality rates.
series.fertilityRate: Average number of children a woman would have, based on birth rates for women ages 15–49.
series.immigrants: People living in the country who were born abroad.
series.immigrantsPercentPopulation: People born abroad as a share of population.
series.currentAccountBalance: Net balance of goods, services, income, and transfers with other countries. Measured in current USD.
series.currentAccountBalancePercentGdp: Net balance of goods, services, income, and transfers with other countries. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
series.tradeBalance: Goods trade balance in current USD, calculated as goods exports minus goods imports. Services are excluded.
series.exports: Goods exports in current USD, excluding services.
series.imports: Goods imports in current USD, excluding services.
series.servicesTradeBalance: Services trade balance in current USD, calculated as services exports minus services imports.
series.governmentGrossDebt: Total government debt before subtracting financial assets. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
series.governmentGrossDebtNational: Total government debt before subtracting financial assets.
series.governmentNetDebt: Government debt after subtracting financial assets. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
series.governmentNetDebtNational: Government debt after subtracting financial assets.
series.fiscalBalance: Revenue minus total expenditure. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
series.primaryFiscalBalance: Fiscal balance excluding interest payments. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
series.governmentRevenue: Includes taxes, social contributions, grants, and other government income. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
series.governmentRevenueNational: Includes taxes, social contributions, grants, and other government income.
series.governmentSpending: Includes consumption, transfers, interest, investment, and other expenses. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
series.governmentSpendingNational: Includes consumption, transfers, interest, investment, and other expenses.
series.totalReservesIncludingGold: Includes gold. Measured in current USD.
series.militarySpending: For armed forces and defense-related activities.
series.militarySpendingPercentGdp: For armed forces and defense-related activities.
series.co2Emissions: Excludes land use and forestry. Measured in CO2e, which includes CO2 and other greenhouse gases.
series.co2EmissionsPerCapita: Excludes land use and forestry. Measured in CO2e, which includes CO2 and other greenhouse gases.
series.area: Includes both land and water area.
series.forestAreaPercentOfLandArea: Share of land area covered by forest.

rankings.gdp-growth: Annual percentage change in real GDP in local currency.
rankings.inflation-rate: Annual percentage change in average consumer prices.
rankings.unemployment-rate: People without work, available for work, and seeking work, as a share of the labor force.
rankings.ppp-gdp: GDP based on purchasing power parity, measured in current international dollars.
rankings.ppp-gdp-per-capita: GDP based on purchasing power parity, measured in current international dollars.
rankings.population: Total population based on residents present in the country.
rankings.population-density: Residents per km² of land area.
rankings.life-expectancy: Expected years a newborn would live under current mortality rates.
rankings.fertility-rate: Average number of children a woman would have, based on birth rates for women ages 15–49.
rankings.immigrants: People living in the country who were born abroad.
rankings.immigrants-percent-population: People born abroad as a share of population.
rankings.current-account-balance: Net balance of goods, services, income, and transfers with other countries. Measured in current USD.
rankings.current-account-balance-percent-gdp: Net balance of goods, services, income, and transfers with other countries. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
rankings.trade-balance: Goods trade balance in current USD, calculated as goods exports minus goods imports. Services are excluded.
rankings.exports: Goods exports in current USD, excluding services.
rankings.imports: Goods imports in current USD, excluding services.
rankings.services-trade-balance: Services trade balance in current USD, calculated as services exports minus services imports.
rankings.government-gross-debt: Total government debt before subtracting financial assets. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
rankings.government-net-debt: Government debt after subtracting financial assets. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
rankings.fiscal-balance: Revenue minus total expenditure. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
rankings.primary-fiscal-balance: Fiscal balance excluding interest payments. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
rankings.government-revenue: Includes taxes, social contributions, grants, and other government income. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
rankings.government-spending: Includes consumption, transfers, interest, investment, and other expenses. Measured as a share of nominal GDP in local currency.
rankings.total-reserves: Includes gold. Measured in current USD.
rankings.military-spending: For armed forces and defense-related activities.
rankings.military-spending-percent-gdp: For armed forces and defense-related activities.
rankings.co2-emissions: Excludes land use and forestry. Measured in CO2e, which includes CO2 and other greenhouse gases.
rankings.co2-emissions-per-capita: Excludes land use and forestry. Measured in CO2e, which includes CO2 and other greenhouse gases.
rankings.area: Includes both land and water area.
rankings.forest-area: Share of land area covered by forest.
